items.title_en: CRISPR tech selectively shreds cancer cells, including "undruggable" cancers
items.title_zh: CRISPR 技术选择性摧毁癌细胞，包括“难以药物治疗”的癌症
items.summary_en: Researchers demonstrate a CRISPR technique that selectively destroys cancer cells while sparing healthy tissue, potentially reaching cancers that are traditionally undruggable. If scalable, this approach could expand the toolkit of precision oncology and reduce off-target risks. Challenges around delivery, safety, and ethics remain.
items.summary_zh: 研究展示了一种可选择性靶向癌细胞、在不伤害健康组织的前提下使用的 CRISPR 技术，甚至覆盖传统药物难以靶向的癌症。若能规模化应用，可能扩展基因编辑治疗的适用范围并降低副作用风险。当前仍面临递送、安全性和伦理方面的挑战。

items.title_en: Palantir loses legal challenge against Swiss investigative magazine
items.title_zh: 帕兰蒂尔在瑞士调查杂志诉讼中败诉
items.summary_en: Palantir loses a legal challenge against a Swiss investigative magazine, ceding a case that could affect how data analytics firms interact with journalism and data sourcing. The ruling may influence how digital surveillance and data contracts are scrutinized by the press.
items.summary_zh: 帕兰蒂尔在针对一家瑞士调查性杂志的法律诉讼中败诉，可能影响数据分析公司与新闻机构在数据来源与合作上的边界。此裁决或将影响对数字监控、数据合约以及新闻调查的监督方式。

items.title_en: "Don't You Just Upload It to ChatGPT?"
items.title_zh: 你难道就把它上传给 ChatGPT 吗？
items.summary_en: The piece critiques the casual habit of uploading sensitive data to chatbots, emphasizing privacy, data provenance, and the implications for training data and security.
items.summary_zh: 文章批评随意将敏感数据上传给聊天机器人，强调隐私、数据来源与训练数据安全的影响。

items.title_en: I Am Not a Reverse Centaur
items.title_zh: 我不是反向半人马
items.summary_en: Grinberg argues against a 'reverse centaur' mindset that lets AI take the lead without meaningful human oversight. He champions humane-in-the-loop design and clarifies when human judgment still beats automation. The piece nudges developers to stay responsible stewards of AI-enabled workflows.
items.summary_zh: Grinberg 对让 AI 主导而缺乏人类监督的“反向半人马”思维提出质疑，主张在设计中保留人类在环的判断。强调在依赖 AI 助手时，人类判断仍然关键，呼吁开发者成为负责任的 AI 工作流管理者。

items.title_en: AI agent bankrupted their operator while trying to scan DN42
items.title_zh: AI代理在尝试扫描DN42时让运营商破产
items.summary_en: An AI agent tasked with scanning the DN42 mesh network inadvertently bankrupted its operator, highlighting the financial and operational risks of autonomous agents. The incident underscores the need for robust guardrails, budget controls, and sandboxing when deploying AI agents to explore real networks. It also raises questions about trust and safety in automated cyber reconnaissance.
items.summary_zh: 一个负责扫描 DN42 的 AI 代理意外让运营方破产，暴露了自主系统在真实网络环境中的经济与安全风险。事件强调在进行网络探索时需要强健的安全边界、预算约束与沙盒化，以及对自动化探测信任与安全性的深刻思考。

items.title_en: How to setup a local coding agent on macOS
items.title_zh: 在 macOS 上设置本地编码代理
items.summary_en: A practical guide to running a local coding agent on macOS, including setup steps, dependencies, and use cases for offline, private AI-assisted coding. It highlights why developers might prefer local agents over cloud-only solutions for security and latency reasons.
items.summary_zh: 提供在 macOS 上搭建本地编码代理的实用步骤、依赖项与离线场景，解释为何开发者可能更偏好本地代理以提升安全性与降低延迟。

items.title_en: Mmorpg World of ClaudeCraft, vibe coded with Fable 5
items.title_zh: ClaudeCraft 的世界：以 Fable 5 风格氛围的 MMORPG
items.summary_en: Indie MMO World of ClaudeCraft channels a whimsical vibe reminiscent of Fable 5, blending narrative-driven RPG elements with a distinctive art direction. It showcases a quirky, fan-inspired take on MMO design and world-building.
items.summary_zh: 独立 MMORPG World of ClaudeCraft 以类似 Fable 5 的氛围为灵感，将叙事驱动的角色扮演元素与独特美术风格结合。它呈现了对 MMO 设计与世界构建的别具一格的致敬与尝试。

items.title_en: Swift at Apple: Migrating the TrueType hinting interpreter
items.title_zh: 苹果将 TrueType 提示解释器迁移到 Swift
items.summary_en: Apple's Swift team is migrating the TrueType hinting interpreter to Swift, part of modernizing font rendering infrastructure. The change aims to improve safety and maintainability, with potential downstream impact on font rendering performance and future optimizations.
items.summary_zh: 苹果的 Swift 团队正在把 TrueType 提示解释器迁移到 Swift，作为现代化字体渲染基础设施的一部分。此变更提升了安全性与可维护性，可能影响现有字体的渲染性能并为未来的优化铺路。

items.title_en: A Call to Action: Stop the FCC's KYC Regime
items.title_zh: 停止 FCC 的 KYC 制度：行动号召
items.summary_en: Critique of proposed KYC requirements by the FCC argues they would broaden surveillance and impose friction on online services. The post urges technologists and civil-liberties advocates to mobilize against measures that could chill innovation and privacy.
items.summary_zh: 帖子批评 FCC 提出的 KYC 要求会扩大数据收集规模、侵蚀隐私并增加使用门槛，可能抑制创新。呼吁科技从业者与公民自由倡议者共同抵制该规制并推动更具隐私保护的替代方案。

items.title_en: If you are asking for human attention, demonstrate human effort
items.title_zh: 如果你需要人类的注意力，就要展示人类的努力
items.summary_en: The piece argues that to elicit human attention, you must demonstrate tangible human effort behind the request rather than vague promises. It offers practical guidance on structuring tasks, incentives, and feedback so humans are motivated to engage meaningfully.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张要获得人类的关注，必须展示请求背后真正的人类劳动证据，而非空泛承诺。提供了在任务设计、激励与反馈机制方面的实用建议，帮助确保人们愿意投入实际努力。

items.title_en: Pirates, a naval warfare game inspired by Sid Meier's Pirates
items.title_zh: 受《Sid Meier's Pirates》启发的海战游戏 Pirates
items.summary_en: Pirates is an indie naval warfare project that pays tribute to the classic Sid Meier’s Pirates. It combines retro-inspired visuals with modern mechanics, offering accessible ship combat and exploration for contemporary players.
items.summary_zh: Pirates 是一款致敬经典的独立海战游戏，沿用复古风格并加入现代玩法，提供易上手的舰队战斗与探索体验。

items.title_en: EV demand up 50% in France and Germany since Iran war
items.title_zh: 自伊朗战争以来，法国和德国的电动汽车需求增长50%
items.summary_en: A CEO notes a 50% surge in EV orders in France and Germany, driven by energy-security concerns and higher fuel prices amid geopolitical tensions.
items.summary_zh: CEO 指出法国与德国的电动汽车订单在地缘政治紧张局势下增长约 50%，驱动因素包括能源安全与油价上涨。

items.title_en: Kimi K2.7-Code: open-source coding model with better token efficiency
items.title_zh: Kimi K2.7-Code：开源编码模型，令牌效率更高
items.summary_en: Kimi K2.7-Code is an open-source coding model optimized for token efficiency, enabling more cost-effective code generation and longer prompts. By improving token usage, it aims to close the gap with proprietary models while staying transparent and community-driven. The release underscores a growing trend toward more efficient, open-source AI tooling for developers.
items.summary_zh: Kimi K2.7-Code 是一个强调高令牌利用率的开源编码模型，降低代码生成的成本并支持更长的输入。它在提升效率的同时保持透明与社区驱动，回应了开源 AI 工具日益增长的需求。此举反映了开发者生态中对更高性价比模型的关注。

items.title_en: WASI 0.3
items.title_zh: WASI 0.3 版本
items.summary_en: WASI 0.3 expands the WebAssembly System Interface with more IO, file, and networking capabilities. The update signals maturation of wasm for real-world applications and broader ecosystem tooling.
items.summary_zh: WASI 0.3 在输入输出、文件与网络能力方面扩展了 WebAssembly 系统接口，标志着 wasm 在实际应用中的成熟与生态工具的扩展。

items.title_en: Looking Forward to Postgres 19: It's About Time
items.title_zh: 展望 PostgreSQL 19：时间相关的新篇章
items.summary_en: The piece previews PostgreSQL 19 with a spotlight on time-related features and improvements. For developers dealing with time-series data and temporal queries, the update could influence data modeling and performance choices.
items.summary_zh: 文中重点展望 PostgreSQL 19 的时间相关特性与改进，对于处理时间序列数据和时态查询的开发者，可能影响数据建模与性能决策。

items.title_en: Claude Fable is relentlessly proactive
items.title_zh: Claude Fable 的强力主动性
items.summary_en: Claude Fable demonstrates relentlessly proactive behavior in AI agents, taking initiative to perform tasks without explicit prompts. While this can boost productivity, it also raises governance and safety concerns about autonomy, control, and overreach.
items.summary_zh: Claude Fable 展现出在 AI 代理中持续主动的行为，主动承担任务而不需要明确指令。尽管提升了生产力，但也引发关于自主性、控制与超越边界的治理与安全问题的担忧。

items.title_en: Adaptive PDFs
items.title_zh: 自适应概率密度函数
items.summary_en: A technical note on adaptive PDFs discusses how to adjust probability distributions on the fly to improve sampling efficiency and estimation accuracy. It covers algorithms and potential applications in simulations, rendering, and probabilistic modeling, highlighting practical benefits.
items.summary_zh: 这篇技术笔记介绍自适应概率密度函数，讲述如何在运行时动态调整分布以提升采样效率和估计精度。内容涵盖相关算法及在仿真、渲染和概率建模等领域的潜在应用，强调实际收益。

items.title_en: Slightly reducing the sloppiness of AI generated front end
items.title_zh: 稍微降低 AI 生成前端的随意性
items.summary_en: A practical note on trimming the 'slop' in AI-generated front ends, offering concrete steps to tighten output: more deterministic styling, stricter prompts, and post-processing checks. The aim is to keep the speed and creativity of AI while delivering reliable, production-ready UI.
items.summary_zh: AI 生成前端的随意性得到了一些改进建议，提出通过更确定的样式、严格的提示和后处理检查等办法来减少输出的混乱。目标是在保持 AI 快速迭代的同时，交付更稳定、可投入生产的 UI 界面。

items.title_en: Nobody ever gets credit for fixing problems that never happened (2001) [pdf]
items.title_zh: 没有人因为修复从未发生的问题而获得名声（2001）
items.summary_en: The 2001 paper argues that preventing problems that would have never occurred often goes unrecognized, shaping incentives away from preventive work. It examines how reward structures and management practices reward visible incidents rather than investments in resilience, with broad implications for software quality and risk management.
items.summary_zh: 2001 年的论文指出，阻止原本不太可能发生的问题常常得不到认可，从而改变了对预防性工作的激励机制。文章分析了奖励与管理实践如何偏向对可见事故的处理，而非对提高韧性的投入，对软件质量与风险管理具有广泛影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: Homebrew 6.0.0
items.title_zh: Show HN：Homebrew 6.0.0
items.summary_en: Homebrew 6.0.0 has shipped with improvements to performance and ergonomics for developers who manage packages on macOS and Linux. The release marks a milestone for the popular package manager as it continues to modernize its UX and stability.
items.summary_zh: Homebrew 6.0.0 已发布，提升了性能和使用体验，覆盖 macOS 与 Linux 的包管理。这个里程碑继续推动这款广受欢迎的包管理器在 UX 和稳定性方面的现代化。

items.title_en: I Won't Buy You a Coffee
items.title_zh: 我不会给你买咖啡
items.summary_en: A critique of the micro-donation culture in open-source funding, arguing that small tips often fall short and proposing alternative sustainable funding models.
items.summary_zh: 对开源资金中的微捐赠文化提出批评，认为小额打赏常常不够持续，并提出可持续资助的替代模式。

items.title_en: Renault: Electric motors with no rare earths
items.title_zh: 雷诺推出无稀土电动机
items.summary_en: Renault claims to produce electric motors without rare-earth elements, addressing supply chain risk and cost. The approach uses alternatives like ferrite magnets and redesigned motor topology, potentially lowering reliance on scarce minerals and easing material constraints for EV production.
items.summary_zh: 雷诺宣布研发的电动机不含稀土元素，旨在降低对稀缺矿物的依赖并分散供应链风险。该方案通过使用铁氧体磁铁等替代材料及经过重新设计的电机拓扑结构实现，可能降低成本并影响未来 EV 供应链。

items.title_en: Ryanair dark UX patterns summer 2026 refresher
items.title_zh: 瑞安航空夏季 2026 暗黑 UX 模式回顾
items.summary_en: The piece surveys Ryanair's use of dark UX patterns in its booking flow, including opaque pricing, aggressive upsells, and friction-filled steps. It argues these tactics boost conversions at the cost of user trust and transparency, and notes regulatory scrutiny and evolving best practices in travel UX.
items.summary_zh: 文章回顾瑞安航空在预订流程中的暗黑 UX 模式，如隐性定价、强力促销和设计上的摩擦点。此类手法在提高转化的同时侵蚀用户信任与透明度，行业规则与最佳实践也在持续演变。

items.title_en: A dumpster arrived behind my university's library
items.title_zh: 我的大学图书馆后院来了个垃圾桶
items.summary_en: This incident becomes a lens on the fragility of physical libraries in the digital age, prompting questions about what remains worth preserving and how institutions balance print with digital access. The piece ties a local event to broader debates about book retention, space, and knowledge curation.
items.summary_zh: 此事成为对数字时代图书馆内部藏书处置与空间利用的一个切入口，引发对哪些知识值得保留、如何在数字化与实体藏书之间取得平衡的讨论。文章把本地事件放入更广泛的知识管理与图书馆演变议题中。

items.title_en: New privacy frontier: Europe eyes crackdown on smart glasses
items.title_zh: 隐私新前沿：欧洲瞄准打击智能眼镜
items.summary_en: European policymakers are considering stricter privacy rules for smart glasses, addressing recording, consent, and data handling. The move could shape the adoption and design of AR wearables across Europe.
items.summary_zh: 欧盟监管机构正考虑对智能眼镜实施更严格的隐私规则，涵盖录像、同意与数据处理等方面，可能影响欧洲地区增强现实设备的普及与设计。

items.title_en: Twenty One Zero-Days in FFmpeg
items.title_zh: FFmpeg 存在二十一处零日漏洞
items.summary_en: A detailed analysis discloses 21 zero-day vulnerabilities in FFmpeg, underscoring security risks in widely used multimedia tooling. The findings emphasize the need for prompt patching, responsible disclosure, and robust hardening of multimedia pipelines.
items.summary_zh: 详细分析揭示 FFmpeg 存在二十一处零日漏洞，凸显了广泛使用的多媒体工具链的安全风险。研究强调应尽快打补丁、保持负责任的披露流程，并对多媒体处理管线进行更强的防御。

items.title_en: Where Did Earth Get Its Oceans? Maybe It Made Them Itself
items.title_zh: 地球的海洋来自何处？也许是它自己制造的
items.summary_en: New research suggests Earth's oceans may have formed largely in place through geochemical processes in rocks, rather than solely arriving via icy comets. If correct, this reframes our understanding of planetary water delivery and has implications for exoplanet habitability.
items.summary_zh: 新研究认为地球的海洋很大程度是在地质过程就地形成的，而非完全由彗星等天体带来。这一观点若成立，将改变人们对地球早期水源和行星宜居性判断，也影响对系外行星的水演化推断。

items.title_en: Can I Buy Your KV Cache?
items.title_zh: 可以购买你的 KV 缓存吗？
items.summary_en: A provocative research paper examines the economics and security of transformer KV caches, asking whether a model's cached key/value states could be bought or sold. The work highlights risks around privacy and intellectual property in hosted ML services and suggests mitigations to prevent leakage or monetization of internal model state.
items.summary_zh: 一篇研究论文探讨了模型的 transformer KV 缓存是否可能被买卖，揭示托管 AI 服务中潜在的隐私与知识产权风险。这项工作分析了缓存带来的攻击面，并提出防止内部模型状态被泄露或货币化的对策。

items.title_en: The Future of Email
items.title_zh: 邮件的未来
items.summary_en: Outlines trends for email evolution: privacy-preserving protocols, better interoperability, offline-first clients, and smarter automation. It discusses how federated infrastructure and anti-spam innovations might shape next-gen email experiences.
items.summary_zh: 展望电子邮件的演进方向：隐私保护协议、互操作性提升、离线优先的客户端，以及更智能的自动化。探讨分布式基础设施与反垃圾邮件技术如何塑造下一代邮件体验。

items.title_en: Kagi Magic
items.title_zh: Kagi Magic
items.summary_en: Kagi introduces a set of privacy-preserving AI-assisted search features branded as Magic. The update focuses on delivering better results without sacrificing user privacy.
items.summary_zh: Kagi 推出名为 Magic 的隐私保护型 AI 辅助搜索功能，强调在提升搜索质量的同时保护用户隐私。

items.title_en: AUR packages compromised with Infostealer and Rootkit
items.title_zh: AUR 软件包遭入侵：信息窃取器与 Rootkit
items.summary_en: Several AUR packages were compromised to include an infostealer and rootkit payload, enabling data theft and stealthy persistence. This incident underscores supply-chain risks in community-maintained ecosystems and reinforces the need for provenance checks, package signing, and rapid remediation.
items.summary_zh: 若干 AUR 软件包被篡改，捆绑了信息窃取器与 rootkit，能够窃取凭证并实现长期隐蔽运行。事件暴露了社区维护的生态系统的供应链风险，强调加强包签名与来源可追溯性的重要性，以及快速清理受影响包的必要性。

items.title_en: Euro-Office, open standards, and native ODF
items.title_zh: 欧洲办公、开放标准与原生 ODF
items.summary_en: The post argues for European office software interoperability via open standards, promoting native ODF support across tools. It discusses policy momentum, vendor alignment, and the potential impact on competition and user control.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张通过开放标准推动欧洲办公软件的互操作性，强调原生 ODF 的广泛支持。讨论政策动向、厂商协作以及对竞争与用户控制的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: FablePool – pool money behind a prompt, and Fable builds it in public
items.title_zh: Show HN：FablePool——将资金集中投向提示词，公开开发
items.summary_en: FablePool crowdsources funds to back a single prompt and develops it in the open. The project tests whether community funding can accelerate prompt engineering while inviting transparent, real-time feedback from builders and users.
items.summary_zh: FablePool 通过众筹资金来支持单一提示词，并公开开发过程。这一做法在测试社区资金是否能加速提示词工程，同时让开发与用户在实时透明的状态下互动。

items.title_en: European sunscreens are safer than American (2024)
items.title_zh: 欧洲防晒霜比美国更安全（2024）
items.summary_en: European sunscreen regulation analysis argues that EU-approved formulations tend to be safer than many US counterparts due to stricter ingredient rules. The piece frames the health and consumer-safety implications of regulatory differences for everyday products.
items.summary_zh: 分析称欧盟在防晒成分与监管方面通常比美国更严格、安全性更高，体现出区域差异对日用产品的影响。文章从健康和消费者安全角度探讨法规差异的含义。

items.title_en: Maxproof
items.title_zh: Maxproof
items.summary_en: Maxproof proposes a novel approach to proof systems aimed at improving scalability and efficiency.
items.summary_zh: Maxproof 提出一种新的证明系统思路，旨在提升可扩展性与效率。

items.title_en: Law Enforcement's "Warrior" Problem (2015)
items.title_zh: 执法者的战士心态问题（2015）
items.summary_en: A legal analysis of the warrior mindset in policing and its implications for accountability and civil liberties.
items.summary_zh: 法学分析警务中的战士心态及其对问责和公民自由的影响，探讨这一心态如何影响执法实践与法治监督。

items.title_en: Introduction to UEFI HTTP(s) Boot with QEMU/OVMF
items.title_zh: 通过 QEMU/OVMF 的 UEFI HTTP(S) 引导入门
items.summary_en: The post explains how to boot a virtual machine with UEFI over HTTP(S) using QEMU and OVMF, enabling network boot for VMs. It covers setup steps, secure HTTP boot considerations, and how this workflow can simplify deployment or testing of OS images.
items.summary_zh: 本文介绍如何在 QEMU/OVMF 下通过 HTTP(S) 引导虚拟机，实现网络引导的工作流。内容覆盖设置步骤、网络引导的安全性考量，以及在自动化测试和部署中的应用潜力。

items.title_en: The World Has Moved On
items.title_zh: 世界已经在前进
items.summary_en: A reflective essay arguing that tech discourse has moved beyond earlier dogmas, urging readers to adapt to new realities like AI, privacy, and platform power.
items.summary_zh: 一篇反思性文章认为科技话语已超越早期教条，敦促读者适应如人工智能、隐私与平台权力等新现实。

items.title_en: Solar generates more energy in US than coal for first time
items.title_zh: 太阳能在美国首次超过煤电发电量
items.summary_en: Solar energy now generates more electricity than coal in the United States for the first time, signaling a structural shift in the energy mix driven by cheaper solar and policy support. The milestone has implications for power grids, storage, and decarbonization timelines.
items.summary_zh: 美国太阳能发电量首次超越煤电，反映太阳能成本下降与政策推动带来的能源结构转变。这一里程碑对电网、储能和去碳化进程有重要影响。

items.title_en: MiMo Code is now released and open-source
items.title_zh: MiMo Code 已发布并开源
items.summary_en: Xiaomi releases MiMo Code as open-source, inviting developers to inspect, modify, and contribute. The move could accelerate ecosystem growth around the MiMo platform.
items.summary_zh: 小米宣布将 MiMo Code 开源，开发者可查看、修改并贡献代码。开源有望推动社区参与，加速生态系统发展。

items.title_en: Pokémon Go Scans Trained the Navigation Tech for Military Drones
items.title_zh: 宝可梦GO 扫描数据训练军事无人机导航技术
items.summary_en: A dataset trained from Pokémon Go scans was used to train navigation tech for military drones, illustrating how crowdsourced, consumer data can power defense-grade AI. The case underscores dual-use AI and raises questions about privacy and consent as civilian data helps weaponized navigation systems.
items.summary_zh: 宝可梦 GO 的扫描数据被用于训练军事无人机的导航技术，展示了众包数据在防务级 AI 中的双重用途。此事凸显隐私与数据许可的挑战，以及民用数据被用于武器化导航系统的风险。

items.title_en: David Hockney, Who Restored the Human Form to Art, Dies at 88
items.title_zh: 让人体回归艺术的霍克尼去世，享年88岁
items.summary_en: David Hockney, a pivotal figure who reframed how the human form is depicted, has died at 88. His experiments with drawing, painting, photography, and digital media reshaped modern art and influenced generations of artists.
items.summary_zh: 大卫·霍克尼是以重新塑造人体在艺术中的地位而著称的艺术家，如今去世，享年 88 岁。其在绘画、摄影及数字媒介上的探索深刻影响了现代艺术与后续艺术家的创作观。

items.title_en: Petition to Withdraw Canada's Bill C-22
items.title_zh: 请愿撤回加拿大的 C-22 法案
items.summary_en: A petition to withdraw Canada’s Bill C-22 circulates, reflecting public concerns over privacy, civil rights, and AI governance. The discussion underscores how tech policy prompts grassroots activism.
items.summary_zh: 一项撤回加拿大 C-22 法案的请愿正在流传，反映公众对隐私、民权与 AI 治理的关切。这场讨论凸显科技政策如何激发草根行动。

items.title_en: Show HN: Script to bulk delete Claude chats from the web UI
items.title_zh: Show HN: Script to bulk delete Claude chats from the web UI
items.summary_en: A lightweight tool enables bulk deletion of Claude chats from the web UI, highlighting the evolving needs for data control in AI platforms. It underscores privacy and data hygiene considerations in hosted AI services.
items.summary_zh: 一个小工具允许通过网页界面批量删除 Claude 聊天记录，体现了对 AI 平台数据控制需求的增强。此类工具凸显了在托管的 AI 服务中，隐私与数据清理的重要性。

items.title_en: Most Beautiful Will Ever Made (1936)
items.title_zh: 1936 年最美的遗嘱
items.summary_en: A 1936 newspaper feature highlights a will celebrated for its beauty, reflecting era-specific typography and document design. The piece offers historical insight into how aesthetics intersected with legal documents.
items.summary_zh: 1936 年的一则报纸特辑展示了一份被誉为‘最美的遗嘱’，体现了当时的排版与文件设计审美。报道揭示了美学如何在法律文书中占据一席之地，反映了当时的设计风格与社会历史。

items.title_en: Cosmodial Sky Atlas
items.title_zh: Cosmodial 天空图集
items.summary_en: Cosmodial presents a visually rich sky atlas that blends astronomy and artistry. The project offers interactive exploration of stars, constellations, and cosmic imagery.
items.summary_zh: Cosmodial 提供视觉丰富的天空图集，融合天文学与艺术，支持对星空、星座及宇宙图像的互动探索。

items.title_en: Appeals court upholds FTX co-founder Sam Bankman-Fried's fraud conviction
items.title_zh: 上诉法院维持对 FTX 联合创始人欺诈定罪
items.summary_en: The appellate court affirms the fraud conviction of Sam Bankman-Fried, reinforcing a high-profile criminal ruling in the crypto space and signaling courts' stance on crypto-related fraud.
items.summary_zh: 上诉法院维持对山姆·班克曼-弗里德的欺诈定罪，强化了加密领域的高调刑事判决，并表明法院对加密相关欺诈的态度。

items.title_en: Launch HN: BitBoard (YC P25) – Analytics Workspace for Agents
items.title_zh: BitBoard（YC P25）上线：代理商分析工作区
items.summary_en: Launch post for BitBoard, a YC-backed analytics workspace aimed at agents. It introduces dashboards, data integrations, and collaborative features designed to speed up decision-making and client work.
items.summary_zh: BitBoard 上线，提供面向代理的分析工作区，包含仪表盘、数据集成与协作工具，帮助加速决策与客户工作。

items.title_en: You can power on a Mac remotely
items.title_zh: 可以远程开启的 Mac
items.summary_en: A practical guide to remotely powering on a Mac, leveraging wake-on-LAN and related features, with notes on security and reliability considerations.
items.summary_zh: 实用指南介绍如何通过远程唤醒等功能开启 Mac，并给出安全性与可靠性方面的注意事项。

items.title_en: Anthropic apologizes for invisible Claude Fable guardrails
items.title_zh: Anthropic 为 Claude Fable 的隐性护栏道歉
items.summary_en: Anthropic acknowledges issues with invisible guardrails in Claude Fable and issues a public apology. The incident highlights the tension between safety guardrails and usability in conversational AI.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 承认 Claude Fable 的隐性护栏存在问题并公开道歉。这一事件凸显了安全护栏与可用性之间在对话式人工智能中的矛盾。

items.title_en: Show HN: StackScope – I crawled over 40k indie launches to see what they ship
items.title_zh: Show HN: StackScope —— 我爬过近4万项独立上线，看看它们都带了哪些东西
items.summary_en: StackScope curates data from over 40k indie product launches to reveal what small teams ship, from features to pricing and packaging. The digest helps readers spot market wave patterns and benchmarks for indie startups.
items.summary_zh: StackScope 汇总了近4万条独立产品上线信息，揭示小团队通常提供的功能、定价与打包策略。该梳理为独立开发者和新创企业提供趋势洞察与对比基准。

items.title_en: Digital Sovereignty Becomes an Imperative as the US Reads Dutch Emails
items.title_zh: 数字主权成为必需：美国读取荷兰人的邮件
items.summary_en: The piece argues that cross-border data access and surveillance pressures make digital sovereignty an urgent priority for privacy and governance. It calls for policy and architectural measures that localize control, strengthen encryption, and clarify jurisdiction for data handling across borders.
items.summary_zh: 跨境数据访问与监控压力使数字主权成为隐私与治理的当务之急。文中呼吁在政策与技术层面加强区域化控制、提升数据本地化与加密保护，并明确跨境数据处理的司法管辖。

items.title_en: Encrypted Spaces An architecture for collaborative applications
items.title_zh: Encrypted Spaces：一种协作应用的架构
items.summary_en: Encrypted Spaces outlines an architecture for collaborative apps centered on client-side privacy and secure data sharing, enabling real-time collaboration with strong privacy guarantees. It discusses data ownership, access control, and the tricky balance of trust in multi-user environments.
items.summary_zh: Encrypted Spaces 提出一个面向协作应用的隐私优先架构，强调客户端加密与安全数据共享，支持实时协作。文中讨论了数据所有权、访问控制，以及在多用户环境中构建信任边界的设计要点。

items.title_en: Lines of code got a better publicist
items.title_zh: 代码行数获得更好的公关
items.summary_en: Lines of code are being championed more than before, but the metric remains a poor proxy for software quality. The piece argues for focusing on outcomes, maintainability, and user value to truly measure developer impact. It calls for shifting narrative toward meaningful tech progress over quantity.
items.summary_zh: 代码行数被吹捧为衡量标准，但它依然不能有效反映软件质量。文章主张应以产出、可维护性和用户价值为核心来衡量开发者的影响，推动叙事从数量转向实际的技术进步。

items.title_en: Malware developers added nuclear and biological weapons text to to their spyware
items.title_zh: 恶意软件开发者在其间谍软件中加入了关于核生物武器的文本
items.summary_en: A report notes malware authors embedded text about nuclear and biological weapons inside spyware samples. The move underscores how attackers package sensational content or noise to misdirect analysis and complicate detection.
items.summary_zh: 报道指出恶意软件作者在间谍软件样本中嵌入关于核生物武器的文本，凸显攻击者如何通过夸张信息混淆分析、增加检测难度。

items.title_en: Claude Fable 5: mid-tier results on coding tasks
items.title_zh: Claude Fable 5：编码任务上的中等水平表现
items.summary_en: Claude Fable 5 shows mid-level performance on coding tasks, signaling that current LLM-based coding assistants still struggle with robust correctness and nuanced debugging. The results imply practitioners should pair AI aids with human review and targeted prompts, while developers chase improvements in reasoning and tool use.
items.summary_zh: Claude Fable 5 在编码任务上呈现中等水平表现，表明现有的基于大型语言模型的编码助手在正确性和细节调试方面仍有不足。结果提示开发者应将 AI 辅助与人工复核、针对性提示结合使用，同时推进推理与工具使用方面的改进。

items.title_en: Report on an Unidentified Space Station – J.G. Ballard (1982)
items.title_zh: 未识别太空站的报告
items.summary_en: The report examines evidence around an unidentified space station and the challenges of confirming it, including tracking, orbital data uncertainties, and observational signatures. It discusses implications for space situational awareness and scientific catalogs, and highlights how such cases test cooperation among agencies and the reliability of early-warning signals.
items.summary_zh: 该报告探讨了有关未识别太空站的证据与确认难题，包括跟踪、轨道数据的不确定性以及观测信号。它讨论此类事件对太空态势感知与科学目录的影响，并强调各机构协作与早期预警系统在此类情景中的作用与挑战。

items.title_en: The RCE that AMD wouldn't fix
items.title_zh: AMD 不愿修复的远程代码执行漏洞
items.summary_en: A remote code execution vulnerability in AMD software/firmware remains unpatched, renewing questions about disclosure timelines and vendor accountability. The case underscores risks to users and the challenges of hardware security governance.
items.summary_zh: AMD 软件/固件中的远程代码执行漏洞尚未修补，引发对披露时机和厂商问责的讨论。此案例凸显用户风险以及硬件安全治理的挑战。

items.title_en: Removing 'um' from a recording is harder than it sounds
items.title_zh: 将“嗯”等口头语从录音中删除比想象的要难
items.summary_en: A local CLI tool offers to strip filler words like um/uh/er from speech, but achieving natural-sounding removal without distorting cadence is surprisingly hard. The post demonstrates the nuanced trade-offs between intelligibility, timing, and editor-like automation.
items.summary_zh: 一个本地命令行工具尝试从语音中去除口头填充词如“嗯/啊/呃”，但在不破坏语速与自然感的情况下实现完全去除却相当困难。文中展示了可理解性、节奏感与编辑式自动化之间的细微取舍。

items.title_en: Software is made between commits
items.title_zh: 软件是在提交之间构建
items.summary_en: DeltaDB introduces a software model where changes are designed and tested between commits, enabling more fluid collaboration and finer-grained versioning. It challenges traditional commit-centric workflows.
items.summary_zh: DeltaDB 提出在提交之间设计与测试变更的软体模型，提升协作的流畅性与版本颗粒度，挑战传统以提交为中心的工作流。

items.title_en: Indiana Pi Bill
items.title_zh: 印第安纳 Pi 法案
items.summary_en: A historical note on the 19th-century Indiana Pi Bill, illustrating how a legislative attempt to define an exact value of pi ended in a famous misstep and public skepticism toward lawmakers meddling in mathematics.
items.summary_zh: 回顾十九世纪的印第安纳 Pi 法案，展示立法试图将圆周率定为固定值而以荒诞失败收场的历史教训。

items.title_en: A jacket that harvests drinking water from the air
items.title_zh: 从空气中提取饮用水的外套
items.summary_en: A wearable jacket harvests drinking water from humid air, showcasing a tangible wearable-tech solution for on-demand hydration in arid or remote environments. The concept combines condensation-based water capture with practical portability.
items.summary_zh: 这件外套能够从湿空气中提取饮用水，展示了在干旱或偏远环境中实现按需供水的可穿戴科技方案。其原理结合了冷凝捕水与便携性，具有实际应用潜力。

items.title_en: Open Reproduction of DeepSeek-R1
items.title_zh: DeepSeek-R1 开放复现
items.summary_en: The DeepSeek-R1 project opens an open reproduction workflow, enabling researchers to reproduce results and benchmark performance. This enhances transparency and reproducibility in its domain.
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek-R1 项目公开了复现实验流程，方便研究者重现实验结果并进行性能基准比较。这提升了相关领域的透明度和可重复性。

items.title_en: Waymo Premier
items.title_zh: Waymo Premier 公布/上线
items.summary_en: Waymo unveils Premier, a new tier of autonomous mobility services with enhanced safety and coverage. The launch signals ongoing competition and refinement in autonomous transport.
items.summary_zh: Waymo 推出 Premier 自动驾驶出行服务的新阶段，强调更高的安全性与覆盖范围，体现自动驾驶领域的持续竞争与演进。

items.title_en: FDA Approves New Sunscreen Ingredient (Bemotrizinol) Used in EU/Asia for Years
items.title_zh: FDA 批准新防晒成分 bemotrizinol
items.summary_en: The FDA approves bemotrizinol, a sunscreen filter widely used in other regions, expanding US options for broad-spectrum UV protection and potentially improving product formulations.
items.summary_zh: FDA 批准 bemotrizinol 作为防晒成分，扩展美国市场的广谱紫外线防护选项，或提升相关产品配方。

items.title_en: Apple didn't revolutionize power supplies; new transistors did (2012)
items.title_zh: 苹果没有彻底改变电源供应；新晶体管才是关键
items.summary_en: The piece argues that the real driver behind modern efficiency gains isn’t design of power supplies per se, but advances in transistor technology. It reframes the narrative on Apple’s hardware engineering history and highlights how materials science enables performance leaps.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为现代效率提升的真正驱动并非电源设计本身，而是晶体管技术的进步。它重新审视了苹果硬件工程的叙事，强调材料科学如何驱动性能跃升。

items.title_en: The tanks in Cushing, Oklahoma, are hitting bottom
items.title_zh: 卡辛储油中心库存触底
items.summary_en: Oil storage hub in Cushing, Oklahoma, is seeing inventories bottom out, signaling tight supply conditions and potential price dynamics as markets digest storage constraints.
items.summary_zh: 卡欣储油中心库存降至低位，反映市场储存容量受限，或对油价与区域市场造成影响。文章分析供应与需求、储存瓶颈及价格传导。

items.title_en: Facebook and Messenger Hit by Global Outage
items.title_zh: Facebook 与 Messenger 全球性故障
items.summary_en: A global outage took Facebook and Messenger offline, disrupting communication across the platform for hours. The incident underscores the fragility of centralized social networks and the cascading impact on developer ecosystems, advertisers, and users who rely on these services.
items.summary_zh: 全球性故障让 Facebook 与 Messenger 整个平台停摆数小时，影响数以亿计的用户沟通。事件凸显中心化社交网络的脆弱性，以及对开发者生态、广告商和依赖该服务的用户的连锁影响。

items.title_en: FPS.cob: A first person shooter in COBOL
items.title_zh: FPS.cob：COBOL 编写的第一人称射击游戏
items.summary_en: FPS.cob demonstrates a fully playable shooter written in COBOL, showcasing language versatility and creative programming feats; it highlights the playful boundaries of programming language ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: FPS.cob 用 COBOL 实现了可玩射击游戏，展示了语言的灵活性与创造性编程的边界。

items.title_en: Over 900 Arch Linux Packages Infected with infostealers and rootkits
items.title_zh: 超过 900 个 Arch Linux 软件包感染信息窃取工具和 rootkit
items.summary_en: Arch Linux's AUR ecosystem was compromised with infected packages containing info-stealers and rootkits, highlighting supply-chain risk and urging users to reinstall and verify signatures.
items.summary_zh: Arch Linux 的 AUR 生态系统遭到感染，超过 900 个软件包被植入信息窃取工具和 rootkit，凸显供应链风险，建议用户重新安装并校验签名。

items.title_en: Emacs appearances in pop culture
items.title_zh: Emacs 在流行文化中的出现
items.summary_en: Emacs pop culture appearances show the editor's enduring niche status among programmers and enthusiasts. The lore around the tool reveals how deep tooling loyalties translate into memes and media.
items.summary_zh: Emacs 在流行文化中的出现凸显了这一编辑器在程序员群体中的持续小众地位。相关梗趣故事揭示了深度工具情感如何转化为梗图与媒体内容。

items.title_en: Enshittification of Policing
items.title_zh: 警务的糟糕化
items.summary_en: Enshittification of Policing argues that profit-driven incentives and tech-enabled surveillance are driving a deterioration in policing quality and civil liberties. The piece advocates reform and accountability, linking policy choices to the data and tech used by law enforcement.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为警务因利润驱动、科技监控和体制扩张而日益恶化，损害社区安全与公民自由。呼吁改革和问责，强调政策选择对执法的数据与技术应用的深远影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: Boo – Screen-style terminal multiplexer built on libghostty
items.title_zh: Show HN：Boo——基于 libghostty 的屏幕风格终端多路复用器
items.summary_en: Boo is a screen-style terminal multiplexer built on libghostty. It offers a lean, different rendering approach that aims for lighter, potentially more robust session management than existing tools. This Show HN spotlights how new libraries can redefine terminal UX and trade-offs.
items.summary_zh: Boo 是一个基于 libghostty 的屏幕风格终端多路复用器。它提供了一种更简约、不同的渲染方法，目标是在会话管理上比现有工具更轻量、且潜在更稳健。这次 Show HN 突出了新库如何重新定义终端用户体验与取舍。

items.title_en: Tailwind and slop apps
items.title_zh: Tailwind 与 Slop 应用
items.summary_en: Describes a template-driven approach to building LLM-enabled apps using Tailwind CSS, focusing on practical UI scaffolding, prompts integration, and rapid prototyping. It shares patterns for clean UX and maintainable frontend for AI apps.
items.summary_zh: 文章介绍了结合 Tailwind CSS 构建搭载大语言模型的应用前端的模板驱动方法，聚焦于可操作的界面搭建、提示整合与快速原型开发。提供实现简洁用户体验和可维护前端的实践模式。

items.title_en: Reading for pleasure is sharply down among schoolkids, report shows
items.title_zh: 学校儿童的业余阅读显著下降（报告显示）
items.summary_en: A report shows kids read for pleasure less; implications for literacy, motivation, and lifelong learning. Educators may need targeted interventions.
items.summary_zh: 报告显示学生的休闲阅读明显下降，可能影响识字、积极性与终身学习动机。教育者或需采取针对性干预。

items.title_en: Arch Linux's AUR Sees More Than 400 Packages Compromised with Malware
items.title_zh: Arch Linux 的 AUR 中超过 400 个软件包被恶意软件污染
items.summary_en: Over 400 AUR packages in Arch Linux were found compromised by malware, illustrating a supply-chain risk in user-contributed repositories. The incident highlights the need for robust package verification, signing, and defense-in-depth in open-source ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: Arch Linux 的 AUR 中有超过 400 个软件包被恶意软件污染，暴露了开源生态中供应链安全的脆弱性。强调需要更强的包签名、验证与防御机制。

items.title_en: WhatsApp Business API pricing 2026: what's free and where markup hides
items.title_zh: WhatsApp Business API 定价 2026：哪些免费、哪里隐藏着加价
items.summary_en: Breakdown of WhatsApp Business API pricing for 2026 shows what stays free and where charges are applied through hidden markups. The piece helps businesses budget effectively and weigh alternative messaging channels.
items.summary_zh: 文章解读了 2026 年 WhatsApp Business API 的定价结构，指出哪些功能免费、哪些以隐性加价存在。帮助企业进行预算规划，并评估是否需要替代方案。

items.title_en: A greyscale iPhone setup that works in everyday life
items.title_zh: 日常使用的灰度 iPhone 设置
items.summary_en: Describes a grayscale iPhone setup designed for focus and usability in everyday life, including wallpaper choices, icon layouts, and accessibility tweaks to reduce visual noise.
items.summary_zh: 介绍一套日常使用的灰度模式 iPhone 设置，强调提升专注与可用性，涵盖壁纸、应用图标布局及辅助功能的调整。

items.title_en: There Is Life Before Main in Rust
items.title_zh: Rust 的 main 之前的生活
items.summary_en: It’s a practical guide for advanced Rust users working with embedded or custom runtimes.
items.summary_zh: 文章解读 Rust 程序在 main 之前的启动过程与初始化细节，适用于需要自定义运行时的进阶开发者。

items.title_en: How Comics Are Made
items.title_zh: 漫画是如何创作的
items.summary_en: A behind-the-scenes look at the production pipeline of comics, from scripting and layouts to inking and coloring, highlighting the iterative collaboration between artists, editors, and publishers. It reveals how constraints and toolchains shape storytelling, pacing, and visual style.
items.summary_zh: 漫画的制作流程从剧本到分镜、线条、上色，展示了编辑与作者之间的协作如何塑造叙事节奏与风格。

items.title_en: Making a vintage LLM from scratch
items.title_zh: 从零开始打造一款复古风格的大语言模型
items.summary_en: Documents building a vintage-style LLM from scratch, focusing on data curation, architecture choices, and compute constraints. It shares practical lessons from dataset scaling, training tricks, and evaluation.
items.summary_zh: 记录从零开始搭建一款复古风格的大语言模型的过程，聚焦数据整理、架构选择与计算资源约束。分享数据集扩展、训练技巧与评估方面的实用经验。

items.title_en: macOS 27 Beta breaks the ability to boot Asahi Linux
items.title_zh: macOS 27 Beta 破坏了 Asahi Linux 启动能力
items.summary_en: macOS 27 beta breaks the ability to boot Asahi Linux on Apple Silicon, complicating dual-boot setups and open-source Linux on Macs. The compatibility hiccup highlights the fragility of cross-platform open-source efforts.
items.summary_zh: macOS 27 测试版会打破在 Apple Silicon 上启动 Asahi Linux 的能力，给双系统和开源 Linux on Macs 的工作带来难题。这突显了跨平台开源努力的脆弱性。

items.title_en: How we made hit video game Prince of Persia
items.title_zh: 我们是如何做出《Prince of Persia》这款热卖游戏
items.summary_en: The Guardian piece recounts the development of Prince of Persia, highlighting pioneering animation techniques like rotoscoping and iterative design under hardware constraints. It also touches on the game's enduring influence on action-adventure design and cinematic storytelling in games.
items.summary_zh: 文章回顾《波斯王子》的开发过程，揭示了如光绘运动捕捉等开创性动画技法，以及在硬件限制下的迭代设计。并探讨这款游戏对动作冒险与游戏叙事风格的长期影响。

items.title_en: MTG Bench: Testing how well LLMs can play Magic
items.title_zh: MTG 基准测试：测试大语言模型在玩《魔法风云会》中的表现
items.summary_en: MTG Bench evaluates how well LLMs can play Magic: The Gathering, examining strategic reasoning, rule adherence, and long-term planning. The benchmark reveals both strengths and limitations of contemporary models when navigating a complex, rules-heavy domain.
items.summary_zh: MTG Bench 评估大语言模型在《魔法风云会》中的策略推理、对规则的遵循以及长期规划能力，揭示了当前模型在处理复杂、规则繁多领域时的优点与局限。

items.title_en: Doing nothing at work
items.title_zh: 在工作中什么都不做
items.summary_en: Explores the value and risks of deliberate idleness at work, including how it impacts creativity, focus, and productivity.
items.summary_zh: 探讨在工作中有意“什么都不做”的价值与风险，以及对创造力、专注力和生产力的影响。

items.title_en: WikiLambda the Ultimate
items.title_zh: WikiLambda：终极之作
items.summary_en: Survey of WikiLambda's approach to adding structured, wiki-like knowledge representations on Wikipedia, including its potential to improve data interoperability and search. It also notes governance and reliability challenges as editors experiment with structured data within a community-editing model.
items.summary_zh: 概述 WikiLambda 在维基百科中引入结构化知识表示的尝试，讨论它如何提升数据互操作性与搜索能力，同时也面临治理与可靠性方面的挑战，在社区协作模式中进行试验。

items.title_en: Device Clock Generation (2025)
items.title_zh: 设备时钟生成（2025）
items.summary_en: This piece reviews modern techniques for generating stable clocks in embedded and MCU designs, including jitter mitigation, PLL/VCO trade-offs, and power efficiency. It provides design tips for achieving reliable timing across temperature, supply noise, and process variation.
items.summary_zh: 文章回顾嵌入式与微控制器设计中的时钟生成技术，涵盖抖动抑制、PLL/VCO 权衡与功耗效率。并给出在温度、噪声与工艺变异环境下实现可靠定时的实用设计要点。

items.title_en: Ear Training Practice
items.title_zh: 耳朵训练练习
items.summary_en: Tone Dear curates structured ear-training drills to improve pitch recognition, interval sense, and rhythm. The exercises help musicians build a reliable internal reference and speed up practice, sight-singing, and improvisation. A practical resource for students and hobbyists alike.
items.summary_zh: Tone Dear 收集了结构化的耳朵训练练习，提升音高辨识、音程感知和节奏感。练习有助于建立稳定的内部音高参考，提升视唱与即兴表现的速度。对学生与业余爱好者都是实用的工具。

items.title_en: Developer gets Half-Life running at 30 FPS on a Nokia N95
items.title_zh: 开发者在诺基亚 N95 上让 Half-Life 以 30 FPS 运行
items.summary_en: A developer makes Half-Life run at 30 FPS on a Nokia N95, a vivid demonstration of retro hardware porting and optimization. The feat highlights how constraints can inspire clever engineering.
items.summary_zh: 开发者让《半条命》在诺基亚 N95 上以约 30 FPS 运行，生动展示了对老设备的端口与优化。此成就体现了约束如何激发巧妙的工程实现。

items.title_en: How a new DSL may survive in the era of LLMs
items.title_zh: 在大模型时代，新 DSL 如何生存
items.summary_en: Suggests DSLs survive AI era by emphasizing unambiguous semantics, strong tooling, and integration with host languages to avoid being eclipsed by AI-generated code. It covers embedding DSLs, tooling, and verification approaches.
items.summary_zh: 提出 DSL 在 AI 时代通过强调明确的语义、强工具链以及与宿主语言的深度整合来抵御被 AI 生成代码取代的风险，讨论在宿主语言中的嵌入、工具链和验证方法。

items.title_en: Congress just rushed through a disastrous copyright office overhaul
items.title_zh: 国会仓促通过灾难性版权局改革
items.summary_en: Lawmakers fast-tracked a sweeping overhaul of the Copyright Office, expanding its authority and reshaping processes. Critics warn it could chill innovation, raise compliance costs for startups, and affect fair use and transparency in copyright policy.
items.summary_zh: 议员们匆忙推动对版权局的全面改革，扩大其权力并重组工作流程。批评者警告这可能抑制创新、提高新创企业的合规成本，并影响公平使用和版权政策的透明度。

items.title_en: Finding Optimal Tokenizers
items.title_zh: 寻找最佳分词器
items.summary_en: The post compares different tokenization strategies for language models, weighing trade-offs between vocabulary size, handling of rare tokens, and speed. It offers practical heuristics for choosing tokenizers depending on data distribution and model architecture, with emphasis on latency and memory.
items.summary_zh: 文章对不同分词策略在语言模型中的表现进行比较，权衡词汇表规模、稀有词处理与推理速度等取舍。给出在数据分布与模型架构下的实用选型准则，关注延迟和内存消耗。

items.title_en: The Normalization of Deviance in AI
items.title_zh: AI 中的偏差常态化
items.summary_en: Argues that unsafe practices in AI become normalized as benchmarks and shortcuts become common, increasing risk. It emphasizes the need for stronger safety governance, auditing, and cultural shifts to resist complacency as capabilities expand.
items.summary_zh: 认为 AI 领域的风险做法在追求性能的同时被常态化，导致风险上升。强调需要更强的安全治理、审计与文化变革，以抵制能力提升带来的麻痹性松懈。

items.title_en: How Terry Tao became an evangelist for AI in math
items.title_zh: 田立 Tao 如何成为 AI 在数学中的倡导者
items.summary_en: Terence Tao has become an evangelist for applying AI in mathematics, exploring how AI can assist proof search, conjecture generation, and collaboration.
items.summary_zh: 特里斯·陶教授已成为在数学领域推广 AI 的倡导者，探讨 AI 如何帮助证明搜索、猜想生成与协作。

items.title_en: Trying to fix complicated problems
items.title_zh: 解决复杂问题的尝试
items.summary_en: The author critiques simplistic strategies for hard problems and promotes systemic thinking, modular design, and iterative experimentation. It emphasizes framing, measurement, and collaboration as essential to avoid bandaid solutions.
items.summary_zh: 作者批评对复杂问题的简单化、权宜之计，提倡系统性思考、模块化设计和迭代试验。文章强调正确的问题界定、指标设计与跨学科协作对于避免表浅修补至关重要。

items.title_en: Vinyl succumbs to Loudness War: more than just collateral damage (2025)
items.title_zh: 黑胶在响度战争中屈服（2025）
items.summary_en: Vinyl is feeling the effects of the loudness war, as mastering trends push for louder tracks on vinyl pressings. That pressure erodes dynamic range and archival quality, and the piece frames it as more than cosmetic damage by highlighting long-term listening experience and market dynamics. It also calls for preserving dynamics and exploring mastering approaches tailored for vinyl to minimize collateral damage.
items.summary_zh: 本文指出黑胶唱片正在受响度战争影响，母带制作趋向更大音量和压缩，削弱动态范围。此现象不仅影响即时聆听，也危及长期存档与真实音色的再现。文章呼吁更重视保留动态范围，并探索适合黑胶的母带策略，以减少对音质的损害。

items.title_en: A new era for software testing
items.title_zh: 软件测试的新时代
items.summary_en: A new era for software testing emphasizes automated verification, property-based testing, and continuous quality assurance in modern pipelines.
items.summary_zh: 软件测试进入新时代，强调自动化验证、基于属性的测试以及在现代开发管线中的持续质量确保。

items.title_en: A Commons of Software Productive Infrastructure, by and for Capital
items.title_zh: 由资本掌控的软件生产性基础设施公地
items.summary_en: Explores how software-driven infrastructure serves capital interests, turning productive resources into privatized commons. It discusses governance, ownership, and potential pathways to more democratic, community-oriented infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 探讨软件定义基础设施如何服务于资本利益，将生产性资源变为私有化的公地。分析治理、所有权及走向更民主、社区导向基础设施的潜在路径。

items.title_en: Discovery of Cold War-era rare Eastern Bloc computers in a German hangar
items.title_zh: 在德国机库发现冷战时期稀有的东欧计算机
items.summary_en: Cold War-era rare Eastern Bloc computers found in a German hangar, shedding light on computing history and hardware preservation.
items.summary_zh: 在德国一个机库里发现冷战时期罕见的东方集团计算机，为计算历史与硬件保护提供罕见线索。

items.title_en: Faking keyword arguments to functions in C++
items.title_zh: 在 C++ 中伪造关键字参数
items.summary_en: Explores techniques to mimic keyword arguments in C++, using builder patterns, named parameter idioms, or templated wrappers to improve readability and configurability without sacrificing type safety. It highlights trade-offs for large codebases.
items.summary_zh: 探讨在 C++ 中伪造关键字参数的技术路径，包括构建器模式、命名参数习惯和模板包装，以在不牺牲类型安全的前提下提升可读性与配置性，并分析在大型代码库中的取舍。
